name: holographicguidedtour
title: Holographic Guided Tour
description: HolographicGuidedTour — A product tour where a holographic spotlight beam isolates the target element, dimming everything else. The tooltip card floats with a plasma-glow border and a progress beam tracks steps along the bottom.
